'''竏單-ng-w-h''' ('''shadangwehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanobrew|nanobrew]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanobrew|nanobrew]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單-ng-w-h
|-
! Lemma
| shadangwehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidangwehoko|thidangwehoko]] || [[word:jidangwehoko|jidangwehoko]] || [[word:shidangwehoko|shidangwehoko]] || [[word:kidangwehoko|kidangwehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudangwehoko|thuthudangwehoko]] || [[word:jujudangwehoko|jujudangwehoko]] || [[word:shushudangwehoko|shushudangwehoko]] || [[word:kukudangwehoko|kukudangwehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudangwehoko|thudangwehoko]] || [[word:judangwehoko|judangwehoko]] || [[word:shudangwehoko|shudangwehoko]] || [[word:kudangwehoko|kudangwehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudangwehoko|thudangwehoko]] || [[word:judangwehoko|judangwehoko]] || [[word:shudangwehoko|shudangwehoko]] || [[word:kudangwehoko|kudangwehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedangwehoko|thedangwehoko]] || [[word:jedangwehoko|jedangwehoko]] || [[word:shedangwehoko|shedangwehoko]] || [[word:kedangwehoko|kedangwehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodangwehoko|thothodangwehoko]] || [[word:jojodangwehoko|jojodangwehoko]] || [[word:shoshodangwehoko|shoshodangwehoko]] || [[word:kokodangwehoko|kokodangwehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodangwehoko|thodangwehoko]] || [[word:jodangwehoko|jodangwehoko]] || [[word:shodangwehoko|shodangwehoko]] || [[word:kodangwehoko|kodangwehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodangwehoko|thodangwehoko]] || [[word:jodangwehoko|jodangwehoko]] || [[word:shodangwehoko|shodangwehoko]] || [[word:kodangwehoko|kodangwehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdangwehoko|thﾃｦdangwehoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦdangwehoko|jﾃｦdangwehoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦdangwehoko|shﾃｦdangwehoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦdangwehoko|kﾃｦdangwehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadangwehoko|thathadangwehoko]] || [[word:jajadangwehoko|jajadangwehoko]] || [[word:shashadangwehoko|shashadangwehoko]] || [[word:kakadangwehoko|kakadangwehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadangwehoko|thadangwehoko]] || [[word:jadangwehoko|jadangwehoko]] || [[word:shadangwehoko|shadangwehoko]] || [[word:kadangwehoko|kadangwehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadangwehoko|thadangwehoko]] || [[word:jadangwehoko|jadangwehoko]] || [[word:shadangwehoko|shadangwehoko]] || [[word:kadangwehoko|kadangwehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
